modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need installation of ENVI+IDL and license server update

full_description_text:  
So, the user was on the phone asking for ENVI+IDL to be installed. They also mentioned needing an update for the ENVI License Server, but it got a bit jumbled in the conversation. It seems like they really want to get everything set up properly, but the details were a bit all over the place.
short_description: Need installation of ENVI+IDL and license server update
description: So, the user was on the phone asking for ENVI+IDL to be installed. They also mentioned needing an update for the ENVI License Server, but it got a bit jumbled in the conversation. It seems like they really want to get everything set up properly, but the details were a bit all over the place.
